pages.title: Cooking Empire
pages.description:
Manage a bustling kitchen by preparing diverse dishes and juggling cooking stations to serve customers efficiently in this casual cooking game. The gameplay emphasizes timing and multitasking as you advance through increasingly busy restaurant shifts. Players refine their speed and accuracy to keep up with orders while unlocking new recipes and kitchen upgrades.

Key Features

• Multitasking cooking stations  
• Order timing management  
• Progressive difficulty curve  
• Recipe unlocking system  
• Casual kitchen environment

Each stage requires careful attention to toppings and cooking level to satisfy growing customer demands.

Key Features

• Sequential burger assembly mechanic  
• Time-based multitasking controls  
• Increasing order complexity  
• Customer satisfaction scoring  
• Casual kitchen environment setting
